    Removes and returns the member with the lowest score from one or more sorted sets.

    Closes the connection.
    ValkeyAPI

    Returns a random key name from the database.
    ValkeyAPI

    ValkeyAPI

    ValkeyAPI

    Returns the last element of a list after removing and pushing it to another list.

    Appends one or more elements to a list.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.rpushxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Appends one or more elements to a list only when the list exists.

    Sets the string value of a key, ignoring its type.

    ValkeyAPI

    ValkeyAPI

    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.sinterAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the intersect of multiple sets.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.sintercardAndForget(List<String> args)

    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.sinterstoreAndForget(List<String> args)

    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.sismemberAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Determines whether a member belongs to a set.
    ValkeyAPI

    since Redis 5.0.0, replaced by: REPLICAOF
    ValkeyAPI

    ValkeyAPI

    Moves a member from one set to another.
    ValkeyAPI

    Sorts the elements in a list, a set, or a sorted set, optionally storing the result.

    Returns the sorted elements of a list, a set, or a sorted set.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.spopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns one or more random members from a set after removing them.
    ValkeyAPI

    ValkeyAPI

    ValkeyAPI

    Removes one or more members from a set.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.sscanAndForget(List<String> args)
    Iterates over members of a set.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.ssubscribeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Listens for messages published to shard channels.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.strlenAndForget(String arg0)

    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.subscribeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Listens for messages published to channels.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.substrAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)

    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.sunionAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the union of multiple sets.
    ValkeyAPI

    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.sunsubscribeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stops listening to messages posted to shard channels.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.swapdbAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Swaps two databases.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.syncAndForget()
    An internal command used in replication.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.timeAndForget()
    Returns the server time.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.touchAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the number of existing keys out of those specified after updating the time they were last accessed.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.ttlAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the expiration time in seconds of a key.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.typeAndForget(String arg0)
    Determines the type of value stored at a key.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.unlinkAndForget(List<String> args)
    Asynchronously deletes one or more keys.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.unsubscribeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stops listening to messages posted to channels.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.unwatchAndForget()
    Forgets about watched keys of a transaction.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.waitAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Blocks until the asynchronous replication of all preceding write commands sent by the connection is completed.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.waitaofAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Blocks until all of the preceding write commands sent by the connection are written to the append-only file of the primary and/or replicas.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.watchAndForget(List<String> args)
    Monitors changes to keys to determine the execution of a transaction.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xackAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the number of messages that were successfully acknowledged by the consumer group member of a stream.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Appends a new message to a stream.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xautoclaimAndForget(List<String> args)
    Changes, or acquires, ownership of messages in a consumer group, as if the messages were delivered to as consumer group member.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xclaimAndForget(List<String> args)
    Changes, or acquires, ownership of a message in a consumer group, as if the message was delivered a consumer group member.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xdelAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the number of messages after removing them from a stream.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xgroupAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for consumer groups commands.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xinfoAndForget(List<String> args)
    A container for stream introspection commands.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xlenAndForget(String arg0)
    Return the number of messages in a stream.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xpendingAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the information and entries from a stream consumer group's pending entries list.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the messages from a stream within a range of IDs.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xreadAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns messages from multiple streams with IDs greater than the ones requested.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xreadgroupAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns new or historical messages from a stream for a consumer in a group.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xrevrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the messages from a stream within a range of IDs in reverse order.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xsetidAndForget(List<String> args)
    An internal command for replicating stream values.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.xtrimAndForget(List<String> args)
    Deletes messages from the beginning of a stream.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zaddAndForget(List<String> args)
    Adds one or more members to a sorted set, or updates their scores.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zcardAndForget(String arg0)
    Returns the number of members in a sorted set.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zcountAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Returns the count of members in a sorted set that have scores within a range.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zdiffAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the difference between multiple sorted sets.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zdiffstoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stores the difference of multiple sorted sets in a key.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zincrbyAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Increments the score of a member in a sorted set.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zinterAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the intersect of multiple sorted sets.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zintercardAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the number of members of the intersect of multiple sorted sets.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zinterstoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stores the intersect of multiple sorted sets in a key.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zlexcountAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Returns the number of members in a sorted set within a lexicographical range.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zmpopAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the highest- or lowest-scoring members from one or more sorted sets after removing them.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zmscoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the score of one or more members in a sorted set.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zpopmaxAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the highest-scoring members from a sorted set after removing them.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zpopminAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the lowest-scoring members from a sorted set after removing them.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zrandmemberAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns one or more random members from a sorted set.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns members in a sorted set within a range of indexes.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zrangebylexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns members in a sorted set within a lexicographical range.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zrangebyscoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns members in a sorted set within a range of scores.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zrangestoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stores a range of members from sorted set in a key.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zrankAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the index of a member in a sorted set ordered by ascending scores.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zremAndForget(List<String> args)
    Removes one or more members from a sorted set.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zremrangebylexAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Removes members in a sorted set within a lexicographical range.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zremrangebyrankAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Removes members in a sorted set within a range of indexes.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zremrangebyscoreAndForget(String arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Removes members in a sorted set within a range of scores.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zrevrangeAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns members in a sorted set within a range of indexes in reverse order.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zrevrangebylexAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns members in a sorted set within a lexicographical range in reverse order.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zrevrangebyscoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns members in a sorted set within a range of scores in reverse order.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zrevrankAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the index of a member in a sorted set ordered by descending scores.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zscanAndForget(List<String> args)
    Iterates over members and scores of a sorted set.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zscoreAndForget(String arg0, String arg1)
    Returns the score of a member in a sorted set.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zunionAndForget(List<String> args)
    Returns the union of multiple sorted sets.
    ValkeyAPI
    ValkeyAPI.zunionstoreAndForget(List<String> args)
    Stores the union of multiple sorted sets in a key.
